text:
Tokarine (トキャリーヌ, Tokyarīnu) is a Hunter and a member of the expedition to the Dark Continent on the side of the Zodiacs. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 359 

Appearance

Tokarine is a chubby woman with a round face, beady eyes, a snub nose, and has a fat-lipped mouth. She wears her dark hair in a bob haircut with a fringe and two locks pointing sideways. The hair at the top of her head is dyed a lighter color. She also has an earring and has an ear piercing in each ear. 

Personality

Tokarine seems to be aware of her own limitations and is not afraid to disclose them. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Tokarine attends a meeting with four Zodiacs, Sanbica, and another Hunter. Gel puts Tokarine in charge of moving goods from the Dark Continent to a relay point managed by Knov. Tokarine comments her ability is insufficient and that enlisting two or three more people would be better. Her inner monologue notes that Gel is thin and pretty. 

Abilities & Powers

As a Hunter, Tokarine has all the benefits granted by her status. Since she was selected by the Zodiacs for the expedition to the Dark Continent, she is most likely a valuable asset.

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Tokarine is capable of using Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 being skilled enough to develop her own Nen ability.
